title: LGE Component Rebuild Schema Catalog
summary: 9 component family schemas and 43 component assignments.
markdown:
# LGE Component Rebuild Schema Catalog

## Families

### hero-carousel-composition

- label: 히어로 캐러셀 전면개편
- useWhen: badge/headline/image/slides 중심의 상단 대표 비주얼을 새 시안 수준으로 재구성할 때
- layoutBlocks: badge, headline, support, visual, action, nav
- requiredFields: headline, visual, action
- assetNeeds: hero-visual, badge-preset

### icon-link-grid-composition

- label: 아이콘 링크 그리드 전면개편
- useWhen: quickmenu, shortcut, tabs처럼 아이콘/링크 그리드 리듬을 다시 짜야 할 때
- layoutBlocks: intro, iconGrid, support, action
- requiredFields: iconGrid
- assetNeeds: icon-set, badge-preset

### commerce-card-grid-composition

- label: 커머스 카드 그리드 전면개편
- useWhen: 상품/서비스 카드 그리드의 밀도, 카드 shell, 정보 위계를 새로 짜야 할 때
- layoutBlocks: intro, cardGrid, support, action
- requiredFields: cardGrid
- assetNeeds: thumbnail-preset, badge-preset

### ranking-list-composition

- label: 랭킹 리스트 전면개편
- useWhen: 랭킹, 베스트, 추천 리스트의 순위 체계와 카드 배열을 재설계할 때
- layoutBlocks: intro, tabRow, rankList, support, action
- requiredFields: rankList
- assetNeeds: ranking-badge, thumbnail-preset

### image-banner-strip-composition

- label: 이미지 배너 스트립 전면개편
- useWhen: labelBanner, summary-banner, brandBanner 같은 가로 배너형 모듈을 재구성할 때
- layoutBlocks: headline, support, visual, action
- requiredFields: headline, visual
- assetNeeds: banner-visual, badge-preset

### service-benefit-hub-composition

- label: 서비스 혜택 허브 전면개편
- useWhen: benefit, mainService, bestcare 같은 서비스 가치 전달 중심 허브를 재구성할 때
- layoutBlocks: intro, benefitGrid, trustCue, action
- requiredFields: benefitGrid
- assetNeeds: icon-set, service-visual

### pdp-summary-stack-composition

- label: PDP 요약 스택 전면개편
- useWhen: PDP summary처럼 핵심 가치와 구매 유도 위계를 다시 짜야 할 때
- layoutBlocks: badge, title, support, benefitRow, action
- requiredFields: title, action
- assetNeeds: badge-preset

### pdp-sticky-buybox-composition

- label: PDP 스티키 구매박스 전면개편
- useWhen: sticky 구매 박스의 전환 레이아웃과 강조 흐름을 재구성할 때
- layoutBlocks: price, benefit, action, support
- requiredFields: price, action
- assetNeeds: badge-preset

### editorial-visual-story-composition

- label: 에디토리얼 비주얼 스토리 전면개편
- useWhen: visual, brandStory 같은 비주얼 주도 스토리 모듈을 새 구조로 제안할 때
- layoutBlocks: headline, story, visual, action
- requiredFields: headline, story, visual
- assetNeeds: hero-visual, story-visual

## Assignments

- home.hero -> hero-carousel-composition
- home.quickmenu -> icon-link-grid-composition
- home.md-choice -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.timedeal -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.best-ranking -> ranking-list-composition
- home.marketing-area -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.subscription -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.space-renewal -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.brand-showroom -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.latest-product-news -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.smart-life -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.summary-banner-2 -> image-banner-strip-composition
- home.missed-benefits -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.lg-best-care -> commerce-card-grid-composition
- home.bestshop-guide -> commerce-card-grid-composition

- pdp-tv-premium.sticky -> pdp-sticky-buybox-composition
